phase-02-3.title: Prompt caching and Batch API
phase-02-3.note: Round 1 PARTIAL (95/100, 3/3 gates) — C9 FAIL only: contract gap where C9's [ EC = 0 ] guard didn't anticipate Sprint 2's pytest plugin exit-100 override from test_plugin_exit.py (all 41 tests passed, EC=100). Contract negotiation hit max rounds (2) with new SN1 self-match flaw surfacing in Round 2; Generator fixed as fix(sprint-03): ebc1fd2 (narrow Phase-2 glob to sprint-0[12]*.md) before any source landed. Round 2 PASS after fix(sprint-03): 0e1db3f changed C9's exit-code check to disjunction ( [ EC = 0 ] || [ EC = 100 ] ); contract-only fix (no source change, verified via git diff --stat). Seven commits (ebc1fd2..0e1db3f) delivered: apply_cache_control helper (system/tools/examples breakpoints with EPHEMERAL constant, examples documented as library-internal pop-and-prepend key), batch runner (single batches.create call, custom_id=sample.id, polling loop on processing_status, demux via id_to_sample map, EvalLog with batch_id+via metadata), and 8 new tests covering G1+G2+F6 (cache_control on system/tools/examples; batch submit-and-demux; batch polling; batch carries cache_control; thinking-block byte-identical round-trip through batch). Total 41 tests under tests/runner/ + tests/models/. Eval at .harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-03-r2.md.

phase-02-2.title: Runner, replayable logs, pytest plugin, observability
phase-02-2.note: First clean first-round PASS since early Phase 1. Contract negotiation hit max rounds (2) with Round 2 NEEDS REVISION (C9 exit-mask + C2 advisory). Generator fixed both as fix(sprint-02): 682c7f1 before any source landed. 11 implementation commits (682c7f1..8a17ea3): async runner with hard caps (token/time/cost/concurrency), binary+JSON replayable log format, deterministic seeds, OTel+Langfuse, pytest plugin (exit 100), token-efficiency metrics, CLI score/report subcommands, ops/langfuse-compose.yaml, sprint-state phase-qualifier docs. 78 tests passing (29 new for Sprint 2). Eval at .harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-02-r1.md.

phase-02-1.title: Python library bootstrap + core primitives
phase-02-1.note: Round 1 FAIL on SN1 only (all 11 success criteria PASS, 100%): SN1's broad .harness/evals/sprint-*.md glob matched sprint-00-*.md Phase 2 files from prior sprint. Round 2 PASS after fix 39a5ae7: narrowed eval glob to sprint-0[1-9]*.md and sprint-1*.md (matches contracts glob).

0.note: Round 1 FAIL on C4 (Python subprocess shell=True routed through cmd.exe on Windows). Round 2 PASS after fix bf30c09/b54a478: explicit Git Bash path with subprocess.run([bash,'-c',...]).
